pkgmetadata.longdescription: libipt is a library for decoding Intel Processor Trace (Intel PT). Intel PT is an extension of Intel Architecture that captures information about software execution using dedicated hardware facilities that cause only minimal performance perturbation.

use.flag: Build ptdump, a low-level Intel PT packet dumper
Build ptseg, a PSB segment finder
Build pttc, the Intel PT test compiler
Build ptxed, an instruction-flow dumper (requires Intel XED)
Build libipt-sb, the sideband correlation library
Enable the small amount of multi-threading support
